data.title: [scan-docs.sh]: size guard implemented at 500KB -> story specified 200KB
data.description:
## Incident Overview
Story 5e33-60aa specified a 200KB file size guard for scan-docs.sh. The implementation uses 500KB (500 * 1024 bytes).

## Expected Behavior
Files over 200KB should be skipped with SKIP:size.

## Actual Behavior
Files over 500KB are skipped. Files between 200KB and 500KB are processed when they should be skipped.

## Impact
Low: tests pass with the 500KB limit. Security/performance impact is minimal but the implementation diverges from the spec without documentation of the deviation.

## Fix
Either change MAX_SIZE_BYTES to 200*1024 in scan-docs.sh to match the spec, or update the story spec to document the intentional deviation to 500KB with rationale.
